title: Beef and Mushroom Pirozhki
description: A classic Russian comfort food dish of beef and mushroom filled dough pastries.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, yeast, and salt.
Gradually add warm water, stirring to form a dough.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes, until smooth.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover, and let rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
In a pan, sauté chopped onion and sliced mushrooms until tender.
Add ground beef to the pan, cooking until browned, breaking it up with a spoon.
Stir in beaten egg, salt, and pepper. Set aside.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of the beef mixture in the center of each circle.
Brush the edges with melted butter, fold the dough over the filling, and press edges to seal.
Place the pirozhki on a baking sheet, leaving space between each pastry.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, until golden brown.
